modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty downloading Coyote Card Mobile on iPhone and Android devices.

full_description_text:
- The user is trying to download the Coyote Card Mobile app on their iPhone and Android devices.  
- They are unsure of the steps needed to access the app on both their iPhone and Android phone.  
- The user also mentioned wanting to use the app on their Apple Watch and Samsung Galaxy watch.
